All SCD Patients =

    ├── A2 results  (ICD HbSS)

|---|---|
| **Sickle cell trait (D57.3x)** | Confirmed excluded from all queries above; verify no trait patients appear in B1–B4 results by cross-checking genotype |

| **Condition `clinicalStatus` not set** | Queries deliberately omit `clinical-status=active` filter — SCD is lifelong and older/transferred records may lack explicit status; review results manually for inadvertently resolved entries |
| **Hydroxyurea for non-SCD indications** | B1–B4 may include patients on hydroxyurea for CML, polycythemia vera, or essential thrombocythemia — cross-reference against A1–A5 results; patients in B-only (no A match) warrant chart review |
| **Siklos (pediatric SCD formulation)** | 100 mg dispersible tablet; maps to the same RxNorm ingredient `202462` — covered by B1–B4 |
| **`_include` support** | If your server does not support `_include`, extract `subject.reference` from each Condition/MedicationRequest entry and resolve Patient resources separately |

## APPROACH 3 — Hydroxyurea Prescription-Based Queries

> Captures patients whose SCD diagnosis may be absent or incomplete but who are actively managed with disease-modifying therapy

### 3a. MedicationRequest — Inline Coded Medication (most common in modern EHRs)

```

### 3b. MedicationRequest — Referenced Medication Resource (chained search)

```
MedicationRequest?medication:Medication.code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|5525&_include=MedicationRequest:patient&_include=MedicationRequest:medication
```

```
MedicationStatement?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|5525&_include=MedicationStatement:patient
```

### 3d. MedicationStatement — Referenced Medication Resource

```
MedicationStatement?medication:Medication.code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|5525&_include=MedicationStatement:patient
```

**Hydroxyurea RxNorm Reference:**
| RxNorm CUI | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| **5525** | Hydroxyurea *(ingredient — broadest match, captures all dose forms)* |

> 💡 RxNorm ingredient code `5525` is the recommended search anchor. It semantically covers branded products (Hydrea®, Droxia®, Siklos®) when servers support ingredient-level matching. ## FHIR Query Strategy: Hydroxyurea Without SCD Diagnosis (Documentation Gap)

This requires **two independent queries** — the result set difference (Set A − Set B) must be computed at the application level, as FHIR has no native NOT/exclusion operator in standard search.

---

### STEP 1 — Set A: All Patients with Hydroxyurea MedicationRequests

**1a. Core hydroxyurea query (RxNorm ingredient code):**
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|5702&status=active,on-hold,completed&_elements=subject,status,medicationCodeableConcept
```

**1b. Include Patient resources in the same bundle (for demographics):**
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|5702&status=active,on-hold,completed&_include=MedicationRequest:subject
```

---

### STEP 2 — Set B: All Patients WITH a Formal SCD Condition (to EXCLUDE)

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|127040003,http://snomed.info/sct|35434009,http://snomed.info/sct|36472007&clinicalStatus=active,recurrence,relapse&_elements=subject,code,clinicalStatus
```

---

### STEP 3 — Optional: Validate Undocumented Patients More Deeply

For any patient ID surfaced by the gap (in Set A, not in Set B), run per-patient confirmation:

```

```

> ⚠️ The `_has:...:not` negation chain is **server-dependent** — only supported on advanced FHIR servers (e.g., HAPI FHIR with `_filter`). Prefer application-level set subtraction for portability.

```

```

---

| Set | Query | Meaning |
|-----|-------|---------|
| **A** | Step 1 | Patients on hydroxyurea |
| **B** | Step 2 | Patients with SCD diagnosis |
| **A − B** | App logic | 🚨 **Documentation gap** — on treatment, no diagnosis |
